_meta.source: Southwire catalog data supplied by project engineer (P.E.), June 2026

specs.SPEC 45052: Southwire control cable: 3 conductors, no separate ground, copper, 600V
specs.SPEC 45252: Southwire power cable: 3 conductors + 1 bare copper ground, XHHW-2/XLPE insulation, PVC jacket, copper, 600V

_meta.caveat: All ODs are NOMINAL dimensions, subject to manufacturing tolerance. Catalog revisions change over time; re-check against current Southwire spec sheets. Per-row OD override exists in the app for actual vendor data.
_meta.areaNote: Cable cross-sectional area is computed in code as (pi/4) * OD^2. No published-area values are stored.
_meta.absentSizes: 300 kcmil and 400 kcmil are intentionally absent from Southwire's standard 3/C power line; selecting them in the app forces manual OD entry.

300.construction: Not in Southwire standard 3/C power line - manual OD required

400.construction: Not in Southwire standard 3/C power line - manual OD required
